pages.title: Pages
trash.title: Trash
editor.title: Content Editor
editor.breadcrumb_hint: Last item is the current page (no link needed).
events.title: Events
mails.title: Contact Messages
mails.name: Name:
settings.title: Settings
settings.branding_desc: Customize the logo, name, and branding visibility. Disable branding for white-label use.
settings.branding_hint: When disabled, the nibbly logo and name are hidden from the admin bar and login page.
settings.theme_desc: Choose the admin interface appearance and customize brand colors.
settings.primary_color_hint: Used for buttons, links, and interactive elements.
settings.accent_color_hint: Used for highlights and brand accents.
settings.button_glow_hint: Adds a glow to editor buttons.
settings.button_radius_hint: Controls the roundness of editor buttons (0 = square, 24 = pill).
settings.admin_language_hint: Language for the admin interface. Default follows the site's primary language.
settings.email_desc: Configure how the contact form sends emails. Messages are always saved locally in the admin inbox, even if sending fails.
settings.sendmail_hint: Uses the server's built-in mail function (PHP mail). For emails to be delivered reliably, the server's IP address must be authorized to send mail for the sender domain (SPF record). This method works without credentials but delivery is not guaranteed.
settings.recipient_email_hint: Contact form messages are sent to this address.
settings.from_email_hint: The 'From' address shown to the recipient. Should match your SMTP account or domain.
settings.smtp_password_hint: Leave empty to keep the saved password unchanged.
settings.test_email_success: Test email sent successfully! Check your inbox.
settings.recipient_required: Please enter a recipient email address first.
settings.danger_zone_desc: Irreversible actions. Proceed with extreme caution.
settings.total_reset_desc: Completely resets the installation to factory state. Deletes all content, pages, images, news, backups, settings, and configuration. After the reset, the setup wizard will appear as if Nibbly was freshly installed.
settings.total_reset_warning: This action is irreversible. All data will be permanently deleted.
settings.total_reset_mismatch: Please type DELETE exactly to confirm.
toast.total_reset_success: Installation reset. Redirecting to setup wizard...
security.weak_password: Your current password does not meet minimum security requirements (at least 8 characters with a mix of uppercase, lowercase, digits, and special characters).
backups.title: Backups
toast.no_images: No images found. Upload images first.
modal.new_page_slug_hint: Lowercase, hyphens only. Auto-generated from title.
modal.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{title}" ({page})? This cannot be undone.
modal.empty_trash_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all trashed pages? This cannot be undone.
modal.restore_backup_confirm: Restore this backup? The current state will be saved first.
modal.delete_backup_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This cannot be undone.
modal.delete_message_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
login.title: Sign in
login.error_locked: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again in {time}.
login.error_too_many: Too many failed attempts. Please wait before trying again.
login.error_wait: Invalid credentials. Please wait before trying again.
setup.complete_message: Nibbly CMS has been configured successfully.
setup.complete_login_hint: You can now log in with the credentials you just created.
setup.title: Setup
setup.subtitle: Initial Configuration
setup.primary_language_hint: Pages in this language live at the root URL (no prefix).
setup.additional_language_hint: Pages in this language will be under /{code}/. More languages can be added later in config.php.
setup.error_username_short: Username must be at least 3 characters.
setup.error_password_weak: Password does not meet requirements: at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, digits, and special characters.
setup.error_write: Could not write config.php. Please check that the admin/ directory is writable by the web server.
block.heading: Heading
field.title: Title
field.video_id_hint: The video ID from the YouTube URL (after v=)
field.track_id_hint: Find the track ID in the SoundCloud embed URL
field.subtitle: Subtitle (optional)
field.caption: Caption (optional)
news.title: News
modal.delete_post_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
settings.backup_desc: Thanks to Nibbly's flat-file architecture, backups are quick and simple — download a complete copy of your site including all content, templates, images, and configuration.
settings.backup_site_desc: Creates a ZIP archive of the entire site directory. Development files (node_modules, .git, etc.) are excluded.
settings.restore_desc: Upload a previously downloaded Nibbly backup ZIP to restore your site.
settings.restore_full_desc: Replaces everything — CMS files, content, images, and configuration. A backup of the current state is created automatically before restoring.
settings.restore_content_desc: Replaces only your content, images, fonts, and page templates. CMS core files and admin credentials remain unchanged.
settings.restore_warning_full: This will replace your entire site with the contents of the backup ZIP. A backup of the current state will be created first. This cannot be undone easily. Are you sure?
settings.restore_warning_content: This will replace all content, images, fonts, and page templates with the contents of the backup ZIP. CMS core files and your login credentials will not be affected. Continue?
settings.users_desc: Manage user accounts and roles. Admins can manage all settings; editors can edit content only.
settings.email_missing_text: Your account has no email address. Without it, password reset via email won't work.
settings.delete_user_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the user "{username}"? This cannot be undone.
settings.email_inactive_hint: Email sending is disabled. Contact form submissions will be saved locally but no emails will be sent. Enable SMTP or Sendmail to send emails.
settings.menus_desc: Manage the order of pages in each navigation menu.
setup.admin_email_hint: Used for password reset. Can be added later in Settings.
login.reset_desc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
login.reset_sent: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.
login.reset_rate_limit: Too many reset requests. Please try again later.
login.reset_invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
login.reset_success: Password has been reset successfully. You can now log in.
login.reset_email_body:
Hi {username},

You requested a password reset. Click the link below to set a new password:

{url}

This link expires in 1 hour.

If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.
login.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
